description: ASP.NET Core operational metrics — requests, latency, errors, runtime health

spec.description: Total HTTP requests in the selected time range
spec.title: Total Requests

spec.description: Request throughput per service over time
spec.title: Requests/sec by Service

spec.description: Error rate as percentage of total requests
spec.title: Error Rate Over Time

spec.description: Distribution of HTTP response status codes
spec.title: Status Code Distribution

spec.expr: topk(15, sum by (http_route, http_request_method, job, method_route) (label_join(ceil(increase(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", http_route!="", http_route!="/health", http_route!="/alive", http_route!="/ready"}[$__range])), "method_route", " ", "http_request_method", "http_route")))

topk(15, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route, http_request_method, job) (increase(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", http_route!="", http_route!="/health", http_route!="/alive", http_route!="/ready"}[$__range]))))

topk(15, sum by (http_route, http_request_method, job, method_route) (label_join(ceil(increase(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", http_route!="", http_response_status_code=~"5.."}[$__range])), "method_route", " ", "http_request_method", "http_route")))

sum by (job) (rate(dotnet_gc_collections_total{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", gc_heap_generation="gen2"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum by (job) (rate(process_runtime_dotnet_gc_collections_count_total{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", generation="gen2"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (job) (rate(dotnet_gc_collections_total{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", gc_heap_generation="gen1"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum by (job) (rate(process_runtime_dotnet_gc_collections_count_total{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", generation="gen1"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (job) (rate(dotnet_gc_collections_total{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", gc_heap_generation="gen0"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum by (job) (rate(process_runtime_dotnet_gc_collections_count_total{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", generation="gen0"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: GC collection rate per generation — Gen2 spikes indicate memory pressure
spec.title: GC Collections / sec

spec.expr: sum by (job) (dotnet_gc_heap_total_allocated_bytes_total{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance"}) or sum by (job) (process_runtime_dotnet_gc_heap_size_bytes{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance"})

spec.description: Total managed heap size per service
spec.title: Managed Heap Size

spec.expr: sum by (job) (dotnet_thread_pool_queue_length{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance"}) or sum by (job) (process_runtime_dotnet_thread_pool_queue_length{job=~"$service", instance=~"$instance"})

spec.description: Thread pool work item queue length — high values indicate thread starvation
spec.title: Thread Pool Queue Length

spec.description: Active Kestrel connections per service over time
spec.title: Active Connections by Service

title: ASP.NET Core
